summary: Deduplication system testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The deduplication feature correctly detects duplicate products by SKU, marks them with appropriate badges, skips them during approval, and hides approve buttons for duplicates.
passed_tests: Existing imports have _dup_status field on extracted products
Re-uploaded PDF with existing SKUs has _dup_status='duplicate'
Products collection count unchanged after approving fully duplicate import
SKU uniqueness enforced at database level (MongoDB unique index)
Upload PDF with existing products detects duplicates
frontend_tests_passed: Import History shows 4 imports (test_dedup.pdf, 2x test_small.pdf, test_sales_guide.pdf)
'Skipped (Duplicate)' badges shown for duplicate products (gray styling)
Approve button HIDDEN for duplicate products (only delete visible)
Approve All button shows correct count of non-duplicate approvable products
Approve All button HIDDEN when no approvable products (fully duplicate import)
'Published' badges shown for approved products (green styling)
Dashboard page loads with 6 stat cards
critical_code_review_comments: Deduplication logic in process_pdf_import correctly checks SKU (exact match = 'duplicate') and name (similar = 'possible_duplicate')
approve_import_products correctly skips duplicates and returns skipped_duplicates count
Frontend AdminImports.jsx correctly shows badges based on _dup_status and _dup_skipped fields
Approve button visibility correctly hidden for products with _dup_status='duplicate'
Approve All button count correctly excludes duplicates
MongoDB unique index on sku_code enforces SKU uniqueness at database level
seed_data_creation: test_dedup.pdf created during testing (0/2 approved). 4 imports total: test_dedup.pdf, 2x test_small.pdf (one with duplicates), test_sales_guide.pdf

features_verified.sku_duplicate_detection: Products with existing SKUs marked as _dup_status='duplicate'
features_verified.name_duplicate_detection: Products with similar names marked as _dup_status='possible_duplicate'
features_verified.skip_during_approval: Duplicates auto-skipped during approval, response includes skipped_duplicates count
features_verified.product_count_unchanged: Approving fully duplicate import adds 0 products to catalog
features_verified.skipped_duplicate_badge: 'Skipped (Duplicate)' badge shown for handled duplicates (gray styling)
features_verified.duplicate_badge: 'Duplicate' badge shown for unhandled duplicates (red styling)
features_verified.possible_duplicate_badge: 'Possible Duplicate' badge shown for name-only matches (amber styling)
features_verified.approve_button_hidden: Approve button hidden for duplicate products (only delete visible)
features_verified.approve_all_count: Approve All button shows correct count excluding duplicates
features_verified.previous_phases: Phase 1+2+3 features still work (homepage, products, admin login, imports)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Deduplication system fully functional. 4 imports exist: test_dedup.pdf (0/2 approved), test_small.pdf (3/3 approved with duplicates marked as skipped), test_small.pdf (3/3 approved - original), test_sales_guide.pdf (1/16 approved). Current product count is 49. Dedup checks by SKU (exact match) and name (similar). Duplicates auto-skipped during approval. Frontend shows appropriate badges and hides approve button for duplicates.
